title: Tunisian Hash Browns
description: A crispy and flavorful breakfast dish made with roasted potatoes and Tunisian spices.

ingredients.name: Tunisian spice mix
ingredients.notes: available at most Middle Eastern markets

instructions: 2. Dice the roasted potatoes into small cubes.
3. In a large bowl, combine the diced potatoes, crispy onions, Tunisian spice mix, salt, and pepper.
5. Add the beaten egg and mix until the potatoes are evenly coated.
6. Transfer the potato mixture to a greased 9x13-inch baking dish.
7. Top with additional crispy onions if desired.
8. Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the potatoes are heated through.
9. Remove from the oven and sprinkle with hash browns seasoning if using.
